Check-in

Check-in time

3:00 PM

Self check-in

Your lockbox code was sent with your booking confirmation. Enter it at the front door keypad — no need to meet anyone.

Getting here

22 Eleven Resort sits along the Medina River Valley just outside Devine, TX. The last stretch is a gravel road — take it slow, especially after rain.

Open in Google Maps ›

Parking

Park in front of your cabin. Please keep the fire lane clear for the other cabins.

House Rules

Things to Do

San Antonio, TX

Explore the famous River Walk, The Alamo, incredible restaurants, shopping, nightlife, and family attractions just a short drive away.

More info ›

Bandera, TX

The "Cowboy Capital of the World," perfect for horseback riding, live country music, river activities, and authentic Texas Hill Country experiences.

More info ›

Castroville, TX

Known as the "Little Alsace of Texas," Castroville offers charming historic streets, unique local shops, cafés, and beautiful spots along the Medina River.

More info ›

Things to Know

Trash & bins

Bins are picked up from the shared collection point — housekeeping handles this between stays, so you don't need to do anything.

Heating / cooling

The thermostat is by the entry. We recommend 72°F — the cabins hold temperature well once set.

Water

Our water comes from a private water well.

Insects

From time to time, especially during hot weather, you may see some insects such as scorpions (non-venomous), spiders, and other bugs that aren't harmful to humans. This is normal in Texas, especially during periods of very high temperatures.

Nature around you

You're on working ranch land in the Medina River Valley — deer, birds, and the occasional armadillo are part of the scenery. Please don't feed any wildlife.

Check-out

Check-out time

11:00 AM

Turn off lights, fans, and the AC/heat before you go.
Wash any dishes you used and leave them drying.
Take out trash to the bin outside the front door.
Lock up / close the door.

Thank you for staying with us. We'd love to host you again.
